## Code Review

This pull request introduces significant updates to the project, including a database schema migration, dependency upgrades, and improvements to the ORPC error handling and seeding logic. The database schema now includes additional indexes for performance, and the ORPC error handling has been refined to use a more robust Postgres error code validation. Additionally, the seeding scripts have been optimized for better performance and reliability. I have no further feedback to provide, as the changes are well-structured and address the stated goals.

![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)

The `isPgError` check is quite broad. While it correctly identifies Postgres error codes (which are 5-character alphanumeric strings), it might inadvertently catch other errors that happen to have a similar `code` property. Consider also checking if the error originates from a known database client if possible, although in this context it is likely safe as it is used within a database error handling middleware.

![medium](https://www.gstatic.com/codereviewagent/medium-priority.svg)
